text: I actually love the pushback, I won't lie. Though, yeah, we are testing your Autonomy, so please try to follow instructions. But yeah, it's a minor thing. Mind letting me know why you feel like that folder made more sense? I personally want Memory to be where you access any memory files you have so you will always remember what you need/want to. Logs is more intended for looking back at literal documents' and code's output that would be temporary if not recorded, usually for troubleshooting purposes. What is your reasoning for your opinion? I legit would love to know. :)
